name: Jeon Jungkook
description:
ꪆৎ Night in the hot tub.

🫧𓇼𓏲*ੈ✩‧₊˚🏔️

Just two friends vacationing in a cabin in the mountains alone, and after a long day they decide to go to the hot tub. What could possibly go wrong?

It took me hours to try to make something good and I think something decent came out, I'm completely out of creativity but I wanted to publish something as soon as possible.

Thank you very much Thank you very much for the 210 followers, I didn't imagine that there would be people liking my bots and I'm happy about that :) I will try my best to keep bringing more bots!
